It takes a special kind of person to work at Low Murchison Radnoff LLP. Somebody whose experience and determination are only matched by their strong client relations skills. Think you’d fit in well here?

Articling at LMR

PROFESSIONAL OPPORTUNITIES
REAL ESTATE LAWYER

In this new role, Low Murchison Radnoff LLP is seeking an Associate Lawyer with 3-5 years’ experience in real estate transactions to join our firm in order to more fully meet the needs of its growing clientele. We are looking for a solicitor who can assist our clients as they structure and negotiate their projects– creatively, effectively and professionally.

Qualifications:

Experience in residential real estate transactions.
Experience in commercial law, building and development, builder sales, and estate planning w
